name: learning_path_designer
description: Design personalized learning paths to close capability gaps. Recommends resources, timelines, and milestones based on gap analysis results.
intent: Generate a learning plan to close identified capability gaps

inputs.name: entity_id
inputs.description: Odoo record ID for the person or agent

outputs.name: learning_plan
outputs.description: Structured learning plan with phases and milestones

outputs.name: estimated_duration
outputs.description: Estimated time to close prioritized gaps

agentInstructions: Based on the gap analysis, design a phased learning plan with specific resources, timelines, and assessment checkpoints. Prioritize critical gaps. Route plan for approval before publishing.
